## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory interview with Shahram Monshipouri for a Backend Engineer (API + Runtime) position at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shahram has extensive experience in full-stack development, distributed systems, and AI/ML integration across various startups](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [growthx.ai is building an internal platform for AI-enabled marketing services with a focus on workflow orchestration and LLM integration](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
  - [The company culture emphasizes remote work and values experienced engineers who can work across the stack](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)

## Topics

### Shahram's Background and Experience

  - [Studied computer science in Sweden, specializing in distributed systems and security](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Worked on multiple startups since 2013, including Talent Circles (HR software), Chartio (data visualization), and Standard Practice (medical billing AI)](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Expertise in full-stack development, AI integration, and building products from zero to one](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Notable projects: AI-powered talent matching, ETL pipelines for data sources, and voice AI for medical billing](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)

### growthx.ai's Product and Technology

  - [Internal platform for AI-enabled marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=2591.0)
  - [Uses TypeScript for LLM orchestration, Python for backend, React for frontend](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=2810.0)
  - [Temporal for distributed system runtime, custom workflow framework similar to Langchain](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=2920.0)
  - [Integration with various AI APIs (e.g., image generation, SEO, fact-checking)](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=2947.0)
  - [Current focus on building UI to replace external tools like Airtable and AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=3002.0)

### Company Culture and Work Environment

  - [Remote-first with an office in San Francisco (moving to South Park)](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=3246.0)
  - [Values experienced engineers who can work across the stack](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)
  - [Emphasis on building products that solve real problems and delight users](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
  - [Fast-paced environment adapting to rapidly changing AI landscape](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=2629.0)

### Technical Challenges and Approach

  - [Building a flexible workflow system to handle complex AI-enabled tasks](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
  - [Developing a custom framework for LLM orchestration and API integration](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=2921.0)
  - [Balancing automation with human-in-the-loop capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [Scaling to handle diverse client needs across marketing and other verticals](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=2597.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Daniel to follow up with Shahram about next steps in the interview process](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=3226.0)
  - [Potential technical interview with another engineer from growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=3226.0)
  - [Further discussion on specific role responsibilities and team fit](https://fathom.video/share/xNnHmJsTdsiwGHybsm21b9h1sH1StpQd?tab=summary&timestamp=3226.0)
